name: nmap
title: Network Mapper
description: Scan networks for hosts, open ports, and services. Put scan options in args (e.g. -sV for version, -sT for TCP connect, -p 80,443 for ports); target is the host or CIDR. Prefer at least -sV or -sT and -p when doing a port scan.

args.description: Scan options only, e.g. -sV -sT -p 80,443. Do NOT include the target host or IP here; use the target field. Include at least scan type and/or ports for useful results.

returns: Stdout/stderr and exit code; scan results in text form.

name: curl
title: HTTP Client
description: Fetch URLs and APIs. Use args for options (e.g. -I, -X POST); target is the URL.

args.description: CLI flags and options only. Do NOT include the target here.

name: whois
title: WHOIS Lookup
description: Query domain or IP registration and ownership. Use args for options; target is the domain or IP.

args.description: CLI flags and options only. Do NOT include the target here.

name: dig
title: DNS Lookup
description: DNS queries (A, AAAA, MX, NS, etc.). Use args for type and options; target is the domain.

args.description: CLI flags and options only. Do NOT include the target here.

name: openssl
title: OpenSSL
description: TLS/SSL and certificate checks (s_client, x509, etc.). Use args for subcommand and options; target is host:port or file.

args.description: Subcommand and options. Do NOT include the target here.

name: traceroute
title: Traceroute
description: Trace route to a host. Use args for options; target is the host or IP.

args.description: CLI flags and options only. Do NOT include the target here.

name: netstat
title: Network Statistics
description: Show network connections, routing, interfaces. Use args for options (e.g. -an); target can be empty or a filter.

args.description: CLI flags and options (e.g. -an). Do NOT include the target here.

name: nuclei
title: Nuclei Scanner
description: Fast vulnerability scanner using templates. Use args for template and options; target is the URL or host.

args.description: Template and options. Do NOT include the target here.

name: nikto
title: Nikto Web Scanner
description: Web server and CGI scanner. Use args for options; target is the base URL.

args.description: CLI flags and options only. Do NOT include the target here.

name: ffuf
title: Fuzz Faster U Fool
description: Web fuzzer for directories, vhosts, parameters. Use args for wordlist and options; target is the URL.

args.description: Wordlist and options. Do NOT include the target here.

name: subfinder
title: Subdomain Finder
description: Passive subdomain enumeration. Use args for options; target is the domain.

args.description: CLI flags and options only. Do NOT include the target here.

name: sqlmap
title: SQL Injection Tool
description: Detect and exploit SQL injection. High impact; use with care. Use args for options; target is the URL with parameter.

args.description: Options. Do NOT include the target URL here.

name: testssl
title: TLS/SSL Tester
description: Check TLS configuration and certificate chain. Use args for options; target is host:port.

args.description: CLI flags and options only. Do NOT include the target here.

name: masscan
title: Masscan Port Scanner
description: Fast port scanner for large ranges. Use args for ports and options; target is IP or CIDR.

args.description: Ports and options. Do NOT include the target here.

name: httpie
title: HTTPie
description: Human-friendly HTTP client (http). Use args for method and options; target is the URL.

args.description: Method and options. Do NOT include the target here.

name: wapiti
title: Wapiti Web Scanner
description: Web application vulnerability scanner. Use args for module and options; target is the base URL.

args.description: Module and options. Do NOT include the target here.

name: amass
title: Amass Subdomain Enumeration
description: In-depth subdomain and asset discovery. Use args for options; target is the domain.

args.description: CLI flags and options only. Do NOT include the target here.

name: hydra
title: Hydra Brute-Force
description: Network login brute-forcer. High impact; use only with authorization. Use args for service and options; target is host.

args.description: Service and options. Do NOT include the target here.

name: tshark
title: TShark Packet Analyzer
description: CLI Wireshark for capture and dissection. Use args for display filters and options; target is interface or file.

args.description: Display filters and options. Do NOT include the target here.

name: rustscan
title: RustScan
description: Fast port scanner. Use args for options; target is host or IP.

name: fierce
title: Fierce
description: DNS reconnaissance. Use args for options; target is the domain.

name: dnsenum
title: DNS Enum
description: Enumerate DNS information. Use args for options; target is the domain.

name: autorecon
title: AutoRecon
description: Automated reconnaissance. Use args for options; target is host or IP.

name: theharvester
title: theHarvester
description: Gather emails, subdomains, hosts. Use args for options; target is the domain.

name: responder
title: Responder
description: LLMNR/NBT-NS poisoner. Use args for options; target is interface or network.

name: netexec
title: NetExec
description: Network service execution (crackmapexec successor). Use args for options; target is host or range.

name: enum4linux-ng
title: Enum4linux-ng
description: SMB/LDAP enumeration. Use args for options; target is the host.

name: gobuster
title: Gobuster
description: Directory/DNS/vhost fuzzer. Use args for mode and wordlist; target is URL or domain.

name: feroxbuster
title: Feroxbuster
description: Fast recursive content discovery. Use args for wordlist and options; target is the URL.

name: dirsearch
title: Dirsearch
description: Web path scanner. Use args for wordlist and options; target is the URL.

name: dirb
title: DIRB
description: Web content scanner. Use args for wordlist and options; target is the URL.

name: httpx
title: httpx
description: Probe URLs for status, title, tech. Use args for options; target is URL or list.

name: katana
title: Katana
description: Crawler for discovery. Use args for options; target is the URL.

name: wpscan
title: WPScan
description: WordPress vulnerability scanner. Use args for options; target is the WordPress URL.

name: arjun
title: Arjun
description: HTTP parameter discovery. Use args for options; target is the URL.

name: paramspider
title: ParamSpider
description: Find parameters from wayback. Use args for options; target is the domain.

name: dalfox
title: Dalfox
description: XSS scanner. Use args for options; target is the URL.

name: wafw00f
title: Wafw00f
description: Detect WAFs. Use args for options; target is the URL.

name: john
title: John the Ripper
description: Password cracker. Use args for format and options; target is hash file or wordlist.

name: hashcat
title: Hashcat
description: Password/hash cracker. Use args for mode and options; target is hash or wordlist.

name: medusa
title: Medusa
description: Network login brute-forcer. Use args for module and options; target is host.

name: patator
title: Patator
description: Multi-purpose brute-forcer. Use args for module and options; target varies by module.

name: crackmapexec
title: CrackMapExec
description: Network authentication and execution. Use args for module and options; target is host or CIDR.

name: evil-winrm
title: Evil-WinRM
description: WinRM shell. Use args for options; target is host.

name: hash-identifier
title: Hash-Identifier
description: Identify hash types. Use args for options; target can be hash or file.

name: ophcrack
title: Ophcrack
description: Windows password cracker (LM/NTLM). Use args for options; target is hash or dump.

name: gdb
title: GDB
description: GNU debugger. Use args for options; target is binary or core.

name: radare2
title: radare2
description: Reverse engineering framework. Use args for options; target is binary or file.

name: binwalk
title: Binwalk
description: Firmware/file analysis. Use args for options; target is the file.

name: ghidra
title: Ghidra
description: Reverse engineering (headless). Use args for script and options; target is binary.

name: checksec
title: checksec
description: Check binary security properties. Use args for options; target is binary or dir.

name: strings
title: strings
description: Extract printable strings from binary. Use args for options; target is the file.

name: objdump
title: objdump
description: Display object file info. Use args for options; target is the binary.

name: volatility3
title: Volatility 3
description: Memory forensics. Use args for plugin and options; target is memory dump.

name: foremost
title: Foremost
description: File carving. Use args for options; target is image or file.

name: steghide
title: Steghide
description: Steganography tool. Use args for options; target is the file.

name: exiftool
title: ExifTool
description: Read/write metadata. Use args for options; target is the file.

name: prowler
title: Prowler
description: Cloud security assessment (AWS, Azure, GCP). Use args for provider and options; target is profile or scope.

name: scout-suite
title: Scout Suite
description: Multi-cloud security auditing. Use args for provider and options; target is profile.

name: trivy
title: Trivy
description: Vulnerability scanner for containers and IaC. Use args for scan type and options; target is image or path.

name: kube-hunter
title: kube-hunter
description: Kubernetes security hunter. Use args for options; target is cluster or service.

description: Docker CIS benchmark. Use args for options; target can be empty or config path.
